summary: Refactoring regression testing completed successfully. All 25 API endpoint tests passed (100%). Verified that extracting ~1300 lines of PM/Admin/Dashboard routes into routes/prescription_manager.py and creating helpers.py did not break any functionality. All 4 schedulers properly registered (check_missed_medications, generate_daily_adherence_logs, send_appointment_reminders, send_refill_reminders). Server.py reduced from 4156 to ~2570 lines.

new_files_created.contents: serialize_model, notify_caregiver, send_missed_medication_webhook, get_webhook_url, generate_adherence_logs_for_medication, ADMIN_EMAIL, MISSED_MEDICATION_WEBHOOK_URL

All PM routes: /api/prescription-manager/users, dashboard/metrics, cleanup-database, webhook-config, webhook-test, user/{id}/health-reports, dashboard/users/{metric}, admin/upload-csv, admin/import-medicines, admin/cleanup-duplicates

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ helpers.py correctly exports all shared utility functions
✅ routes/prescription_manager.py correctly imports from helpers and auth modules
✅ server.py correctly imports and mounts pm_router
✅ set_db() pattern used consistently across all route modules
✅ All 4 schedulers properly registered with correct job IDs

test_credentials.note: Google OAuth required for authenticated flows
